creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
Unfortunately, I can no longer work out how to port later versions of eclipse. My last attempt was for 4.23. While I can get this port to build, I have missed something critical, as I cannot get my port to generate the right build-artifact.

If you have java skills, and patience to work thru' Maven and Tycho builds, you can  attempt a build. My stalled work is available at https://github.com/daemonblade/freebsd-eclipse
